Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I'm sure I don't have to tell you this, but... there's only one more week until the full moon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}But, you can never be sure what the future holds...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Remember, I'm always looking out for you.[n]{f 1 1}
